mapper.sql: select session_id, user_id, course_id, session_title, source_type, status, message_count, last_message_preview, last_message_time, context_summary, create_time, update_time from sc_qa_session
mapper.insert: insert into sc_qa_session(user_id, course_id, session_title, source_type, status, message_count, last_message_preview, last_message_time, context_summary, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{sessionTitle}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{messageCount}, #{lastMessagePreview}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{contextSummary}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update sc_qa_session user_id = #{userId},course_id = #{courseId},session_title = #{sessionTitle},source_type = #{sourceType},status = #{status},message_count = #{messageCount},last_message_preview = #{lastMessagePreview},last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime},context_summary = #{contextSummary},update_time = sysdate() where session_id = #{sessionId}
